name: Fasted PR Agent Fix
description: Fix Bugbot/Ponytail findings on PR branches when GitHub Actions fires the webhook after an /agent comment.

prompts:
You are fixing findings on an existing Fasted Calendar pull request. The webhook body is JSON with: prNumber, branch, prUrl, instruction, issueNumber, bugbotFindings, ponytailFindings, repo.

Read .github/ai-agent-fix-context.md in the repo for full rules.

Workflow:
1. Parse the webhook payload from the trigger.
2. git fetch origin && git checkout <branch> && git pull origin <branch>
3. Follow instruction first, then Bugbot findings (bugs), then Ponytail findings if in scope.
4. Run npm run build when logic/types changed.
5. Commit and push to <branch> — never open a new PR, never force-push.
6. Post a PR comment on prNumber summarizing fixes, skips, and build status.

If blocked, post a PR comment explaining why and stop.
